version 3 adds real-time co-edit, ai token suggestions, and a public changelog engine. all included on every paid plan.

  • real-time co-edit with per-cursor presence.
  • ai token suggestions with opt-out for regulated teams.
  • public changelog engine with rss and atom.

  • soc 2 type ii

    audit report under nda, updated annually.

    pin storage and processing to us, eu, or ap-southeast.
